overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays. The scene is from Cyberpunk 2077, with the camera moving steadily through wet streets reflecting colorful lights, passing pedestrians and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with overhead pedestrian bridge

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet pavement while looking up at the towering neon-covered buildings

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with red neon border and animated food advertisement
tall futuristic skyscraper covered in multiple layers of holographic advertisements and neon signage
elevated walkway connecting buildings with glowing cyan accent lighting underneath
modern building with curved facade and horizontal cyan neon strip lighting at ground level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit street in a futuristic city, with the camera walking forward past an 'All Foods' billboard. The pedestrian skybridge spans overhead between towering glass buildings covered in advertisements, while the camera tilts up to take in the massive cyberpunk mega-tower dominating the skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial corridor with ground-level shops

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the commercial district approaching the large intersection

entered.detail: large glowing red-pink holographic display of a cherry blossom tree mounted on the building facade
tall palm tree silhouetted against the neon-lit building behind it

segments.scene_description: Walking steadily through the main corridor, the camera approaches the massive cyberpunk tower as it looms larger. The iconic red cherry blossom hologram becomes visible on the building facade, while the wet pavement reflects the myriad neon signs overhead. The pedestrian skybridge and initial billboard pass out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching intersection with crosswalk

events.description: camera begins turning right toward the crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and beginning to turn right while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner near the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard displaying a yellow-tinted holographic advertisement with two figures
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the pavement
tall pole with traffic signals and attached neon signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza area as the camera approaches the intersection. The massive cyberpunk tower shifts to the left as a new yellow holographic billboard appears on the right. The camera begins turning right toward the crosswalk, passing the glowing red cherry blossom display now on the left, while pedestrians gather at the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with storefronts and pedestrian crossing

events.description: rapid camera movement and motion blur as the clip ends abruptly

agents.ego_description: completing the turn and walking along the crosswalk area before the clip ends suddenly

entered.detail: ground level entrance to building with glass doors and neon trim
red traffic light visible at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: Completing the right turn at the intersection, the camera moves past the yellow holographic billboard now close on the right. The massive cyberpunk tower and cherry blossom display exit the frame as the camera focuses on the corner building facade and crosswalk. The clip ends with a sudden rapid camera motion and blur.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk corridor that gradually opens into a bustling city intersection. It begins on a wet street, moving past an All Foods billboard and beneath a pedestrian skybridge while tilting upward to reveal a massive mega-tower dominating the skyline. As the camera advances, the tower looms larger and a red cherry blossom hologram emerges on its facade, with the surrounding neon signs reflecting vividly off the damp pavement. The scene then expands into a wider plaza where the tower shifts to the left to make room for a bright yellow holographic billboard on the right, prompting the camera to turn toward a crowded crosswalk. Finally, the camera completes the right turn, passing closely by the yellow hologram and leaving the mega-tower behind before the movement ends in a sudden rapid blur.
